## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`bun run test`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`bun run lint`)
- [ ] Examples validate (`bunx @google/design.md spec`)
- [ ] Docs updated (if `SKILL.md` or an extension was touched)
- [ ] Conventional commit message
- [ ] Linked issue (if applicable)
